© 2026 Taylor Ritchie
Systems thinker.
Builder. Operator.

I design, build, and run the technology that keeps a nonprofit functioning — from Power Platform architecture and Dataverse integrations to grant reporting, donor systems, and employee handbooks. I'm the same person who writes the JavaScript and writes the SOP.

What I Do
⚡

Power Platform Development

Model-driven and Canvas Power Apps, Dataverse architecture, Power Automate flows, Power BI dashboards — built solo, production-grade.

🏗

Systems & Operations

Process design, SOP authoring, workflow automation, and operations manual development for a 24/7 shelter organization.

🤝

Fundraising & Donor Systems

Grant writing, reporting, and compliance. Full donor lifecycle: database, payment integrations (Stripe, Givebutter), stewardship.

🤖

AI & Automation

Custom MCP server development, prompt engineering, AI-assisted workflows, and generative AI quality assurance.

📢

Brand & Communications

Brand standards, social media strategy across Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn, donor communications, and mission storytelling.

🔒

Privacy & Compliance

Privacy Officer duties, HIPAA-adjacent data architecture, field-level security, and grant compliance reporting.
